groundstation.config.frequencybandwidth..Description: The value of the bandwidth. AWS Ground Station currently has the following bandwidth limitations:   + For `AntennaDownlinkDemodDecodeconfig`, valid values are between 125 kHz to 650 MHz.+ For `AntennaDownlinkconfig`, valid values are between 10 kHz to 54 MHz.+ For `AntennaUplinkConfig`, valid values are between 10 kHz to 54 MHz.
